meta.standard: SNAP - Standar Nasional Open API Pembayaran
meta.governance: Maintained by ASPI (since 2023-09); originated by Bank Indonesia

sourceDocuments.title: SNAP Standar Nasional Open API Pembayaran - Standar Teknis dan Keamanan
SNAP Standar Nasional Open API Pembayaran - Standar Data dan Spesifikasi Teknis

meta.disclaimer: Derived technical interpretation by the payment-gateway team, for implementation and traceability. NOT a copy or redistribution of the BI/ASPI documents. Obtain the authoritative PDFs from ASPI and verify the sha256 above. Consult the ASPI developer portal (apidevportal.aspi-indonesia.or.id) for exact text and per-bank profiles.

entries.title: Transport and format
entries.summary: REST APIs, JSON request/response bodies, UTF-8 encoding. HTTP verbs POST/GET/DELETE/PUT. The access-token service is always POST.

entries.title: Access token endpoint (B2B / B2B2C)
entries.summary: OAuth2 client-credentials token. B2B path {version}/access-token/b2b (service code 73); B2B2C {version}/access-token/b2b2c (74). POST. Token TTL 900s (15 min). Response: accessToken, tokenType (Bearer | Mac), expiresIn.

entries.title: Access token signature (asymmetric)
entries.summary: Token request is signed with the client's RSA private key; the provider validates with the registered public key.

entries.title: Transaction headers (B2B)
entries.summary: Headers on every transactional call (bank<->biller B2B): Content-Type, Authorization (Bearer accessToken), X-TIMESTAMP, X-SIGNATURE, ORIGIN (optional), X-PARTNER-ID (<=36), X-EXTERNAL-ID (<=36), CHANNEL-ID (<=5). B2B2C adds Authorization-Customer, X-IP-ADDRESS, X-DEVICE-ID, X-LATITUDE/LONGITUDE.

entries.title: Transaction signature - symmetric (type 1, default)
entries.summary: Default X-SIGNATURE for transactional calls. HMAC-SHA512 keyed by the client secret over a string that binds method, endpoint, access token, a hash of the (minified) body, and the timestamp. X-SIGNATURE type marker = 1.

entries.title: Transaction signature - asymmetric (type 2)
entries.summary: Alternative X-SIGNATURE without an access token. RSA over the same string but WITHOUT the AccessToken segment. X-SIGNATURE type marker = 2.

entries.title: Body minification for hashing
entries.summary: Before SHA-256, the request body is minified (insignificant whitespace removed). An absent body hashes the empty string. On OUTBOUND signing we must minify; on INBOUND verification we hash the raw bytes the counterparty sent.

entries.title: EndpointUrl in stringToSign
entries.summary: EndpointUrl is the relative path including all query parameters (not the absolute URL).

entries.title: X-TIMESTAMP format
entries.summary: ISO-8601 with timezone offset: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSTZD. The field spec includes milliseconds (.SSS); the doc's own example omits them (e.g. 2020-12-17T10:55:00+07:00) - follow the specific bank's sandbox. Parse leniently.

entries.title: X-EXTERNAL-ID semantics
entries.summary: Reference number that must be unique within the same day (idempotency key). Max 36 chars. Type is Alphanumeric as of v1.0.2 (was Numeric String in 1.0.1).

entries.title: Response code format
entries.summary: 7-digit responseCode = [HTTP status:3][service code:2][case code:2]. VA service code = 24 (inquiry) / 25 (payment). Examples: 2002400 inquiry success, 2002500 payment success, 4042412 VA not found, 4042414 paid bill, 4042419 expired bill, 4042512 payment VA not found, 4042513 invalid amount, 4012400 invalid signature, 4092400 conflict (duplicate X-EXTERNAL-ID).

entries.title: Virtual Account services (overview)
entries.summary: VA service family. SELF_HOSTED / gateway-hosted path (bank -> gateway): Inquiry, Payment, Inquiry Status. BANK_HOSTED path (gateway -> bank): Create VA, Update VA, Update Status VA, Get Report. Field-level schemas are enriched per-operation when the maybank adapter is built.

entries.title: VA Inquiry (bank -> gateway)
entries.summary: Bank queries the biller for a VA's bill detail. Gateway answers with virtualAccountData (name, totalAmount, billDetails, inquiryStatus). HTTP method is POST as of v1.0.2 (changed from GET). Path commonly {version}/transfer-va/inquiry.

entries.title: VA Payment notification (bank -> gateway)
entries.summary: Bank notifies the biller of a received payment; gateway records it and acknowledges. Path commonly {version}/transfer-va/payment. v1.0.2: parameter billReferenceNo is camelCase (was BillReferenceNo); several VA fields changed from left-pad '0' to left-pad space.

entries.title: VA create/update (gateway -> bank, BANK_HOSTED)
entries.summary: Create VA, Update VA, Update Status VA, Get Report - used only on the BANK_HOSTED (Model 2) path where the bank owns the VA registry. Not needed for the SELF_HOSTED launch banks; implement when a bank-hosted SNAP deal lands.

entries.title: v1.0.1 -> v1.0.2 changes relevant to VA
entries.summary: Security doc: removed 'Private Key' wording from key-exchange §1.7.1/1.7.2; access-token body granttype -> grantType; X-EXTERNAL-ID Numeric -> Alphanumeric. Data doc (VA-relevant): Inquiry VA HTTP GET -> POST; payment BillReferenceNo -> billReferenceNo; left-pad '0' -> left-pad space on VA fields; timezone examples '-07:00' -> '+07:00'; assorted Datetime/ISO8601 types -> String. None break the prior PTB BCA implementation.
